Welcome to the Ubuntu External SSD Guide Discussions!

We use this space to:
- Ask questions about the guide or Linux in general
- Share tips and tricks
- Discuss hardware compatibility (e.g., "Does this SSD work well?")
- Help each other troubleshoot issues

Please be kind and constructive. Remember that many users here are absolute beginners.
